diagrams.title: DVFS Operating Region
diagrams.description: Shows the relationship between voltage, frequency, and power consumption in DVFS
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how DVFS adjusts power by changing voltage and frequency together

diagrams.title: CPU State Transitions
diagrams.description: State diagram showing transitions between C-states and P-states during operation
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how CPU moves between power states based on workload

diagrams.title: PUE Calculation
diagrams.description: Diagram showing energy flow in a data center for PUE calculation
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how PUE measures infrastructure overhead

diagrams.title: Energy Proportionality Curve
diagrams.description: Graph comparing ideal vs actual power consumption vs utilization
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the goal of energy proportional computing
